title: camaion undulata
intro: Camaion undulata, also known as the "Mangosteen" or "Purple Mangosteen", is a tropical fruit-bearing evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant is prized for its rind, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The rind of Camaion undulata contains xanthones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Camaion undulata is often prepared as a tea, juice, or supplement, and its extracts are used in herbal preparations to support overall well-being.
